channel.title: freedom on My Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in freedom on My Stream of Thoughts

item.title: Do we have programming freedom ?
item.description: <p> <span>But</span> the problem is <span>to map</span> our conceptual model&nbsp;into the&nbsp;programming language. This is not an easy task to do as we are heavily dependent on programming infrastructure.&nbsp;Sometimes we wait for the language designer to update certain things (we used to joke about Java updates), and if it requires additional power from the IDE,&nbsp;we must wait for the IDE vendor. Most importantly programming language has simple, and few notations that can be expressed in comparison with our natural language.
